name: Bino's Kitchen Knife
explicitMods:
On Killing a Poisoned Enemy, Enemies within 3 metres are Poisoned, and you and
Allies Regenerate 400 Life per second for the Poison's duration if within 3 metres
flavourText: Calling it poison would imply
that it was even edible.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Buffs you, and affects nearby enemies with an aura, differently depending on your stance. Both stances are more impactful against enemies closer to you. Using the skill again alternates between Blood Stance and Sand Stance.
explicitMods: While in Blood Stance, Aura makes Enemies take up to 20% more Physical Damage from Hits
While in Sand Stance, Buff makes you take up to 19% less Damage from Enemies in Aura
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants a buff giving more poison damage and a chance to inflict poison. When you poison an enemy while you have this buff, you gain Virulence, and summon an Agony Crawler minion that uses projectile and area attacks. You will lose Virulence over time, at a rate which increases the more Virulence you have. The minion will die when you have no Virulence.
explicitMods: Buff grants 20% chance to Poison on Hit
Grants Virulence when you Poison an Enemy
Buff grants 10% more Damage with Poison
Agony Crawler has 4% increased Attack Speed per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler deals 9% increased Physical Damage per Virulence you have
Agony Crawler has 45 to 84 Added Physical Damage per Virulence you have
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

typeLine: Saturated Divine Life Flask of Allaying
explicitMods:
Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 13 seconds if used while Bleeding
Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 13 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood
descrText: Right click to drink. Can only hold charges while in belt. Refills as you kill monsters.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Charges at a targeted location or enemy, pushing away enemies in your path and repeatedly dealing off-hand damage in a small area in front of you. You deal damage in a larger area when you reach the target. The further you travel, the more damage you deal, and the greater your chance of stunning enemies.
explicitMods: 252 to 378 Base Off Hand Physical Damage
8 to 12 Added Physical Damage per 15 Armour or Evasion Rating on Shield
75% increased Stun Threshold reduction on enemies at Maximum charge distance
100% more Damage with Hits at Maximum Charge Distance
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Grants Elusive and a buff that grants Phasing. While you have this buff, monsters that enter an area around you will be Withered. Using a skill or losing the Elusive buff ends this skill's effects. Shares a cooldown with other Blink skills. Cannot be used while already Elusive.
explicitMods:
Cannot be Cast or Triggered while Elusive
Grants Elusive
This Skill's Cooldown does not recover during its effect
38% increased Effect of Elusive from this Skill
Inflicts 8 Withered Debuffs the first time each Enemy enters the Area
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

Feasting and drinking of the milk of the mother,
they fought to the death for every last drop.

socketedItems.secDescrText: Applies a buff that protects the lower half of your life, preventing some of the immediate life loss when damaged by hits and applying the loss over time instead. Your life cannot be raised above low life other than by flasks, and while above low life, skills will cost life as well as mana.
explicitMods:
Life Recovery other than Flasks cannot Recover Life to above Low Life
When taking Damage from Hits, 40% of Life loss below half Life is Prevented, then 76% of Life loss prevented this way is lost over 4 seconds
Skills gain a Base Life Cost equal to 40% of Base Mana Cost while not on Low Life
socketedItems.descrText: Place into an item socket of the right colour to gain this skill. Right click to remove from a socket.

flavourText: "A man's soul rules from a cavern of bone, learns and
judges through flesh-born windows. The heart is meat.
The head is where the Man is."
- Lavianga, Advisor to Kaom

flavourText: The Black Sekhema was a formidable fighter
alongside her dekhara, but she was unstoppable
when she fought atop her trusted mount, Shiyo.

name: Betrayal's Sting
implicitMods: Adds 3 to 13 Physical Damage to Attacks
explicitMods: 46% chance to inflict an additional Poison on the same Target when you inflict Poison
flavourText: It is not a wound caused by an enemy that bites us twice.
It is the smile, the nod... the handshake... of a former friend.

name: Foulborn Lightning Coil
implicitMods: +2 to Level of Socketed Curse Gems
You take 50% reduced Extra Damage from Critical Strikes
explicitMods: Adds 1 to 25 Lightning Damage to Attacks
50% of Physical Damage from Hits taken as Lightning Damage
mutatedMods: 50% of Chaos Damage taken as Lightning Damage
flavourText: "There's nothing like imminent death
to galvanize one's purpose in life."
- Malachai the Soulless.

a better world... but building requires sacrifice, and the useless
would be crushed into the foundation of her new utopia.
